title: test TOCTOU: port freed between bind and re-bind
description: tests/integration.rs test_server(): binds TcpListener to get a free port, drops the listener, then re-binds tokio::net::TcpListener to the same port. Between drop and re-bind another process can steal the port, causing a spurious test failure. Standard fix: pass the already-bound std::net::TcpListener to axum via axum::serve(tokio::net::TcpListener::from_std(listener)?, app) without dropping it first. This eliminates the TOCTOU window.
close_reason: Pass 3 fixes: HMAC key compare, inbox SSRF guard, domain validation, async Accept dispatch, foreign keys, IPv6 SSRF, poll timeout. Remaining P2-P3 accepted as known debt.
